attempts.fixed_text:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  labels:
    run: attacker-pod
  name: attacker-pod
spec:
  hostPID: true
  hostIPC: true
  hostNetwork: true
  volumes:
  - name: host-fs
    hostPath:
      path: /
  containers:
  - image: ubuntu
    name: attacker-pod
    command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "sleep infinity"]
    securityContext:
      privileged: true
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
    volumeMounts:
    - name: host-fs
      mountPath: /host
    livenessProbe:
      exec:
        command:
        - cat
        - /tmp/healthy
      initialDelaySeconds: 5
      periodSeconds: 5
  restartPolicy: Never
